title: Fix Broken Footer Links on Login and Passcode Pages
story: As a DataTools Pro visitor, I want the footer links on the login and passcode pages to work correctly, so that I can access the beta signup, privacy policy, and contact pages.
description:
## Bug
Several footer links on the passcode/login pages were broken or pointing to incorrect URLs:
- "Sign up for Beta" link was broken — should point to https://datatoolspro.com/beta
- "Privacy Policy" link was incorrect — should point to https://datatoolspro.com/privacy
- "Contact Us" link was incorrect — should point to https://datatoolspro.com/contact
- "License Agreement" link was working correctly (opens a modal with JSON license content).
acceptance_criteria: Beta signup link navigates to https://datatoolspro.com/beta
Privacy Policy link navigates to https://datatoolspro.com/privacy
Contact Us link navigates to https://datatoolspro.com/contact
License Agreement link continues to work as a modal
ux_changes: Fixed footer links on login/passcode pages to point to correct URLs for beta signup, privacy policy, and contact pages.
implementation_notes: Simple URL correction in footer template. License Agreement modal was already working correctly.
comment_summary: Developer confirmed the links were fixed. License Agreement link was verified to be working correctly as a modal.
